message:
feat(cli): add review queue command for session triage

Introduce `ntm review-queue` subcommand that surfaces completed agent
sessions requiring human review, with priority scoring and batch
actions. This gives operators a single entry point for post-session
triage instead of manually scanning event logs and history files.

- review_queue.go: ReviewQueueCmd implementation with list, approve,
  reject, and defer subcommands; sessions scored by duration, error
  count, and uncommitted-change presence
- review_queue_test.go: unit tests for scoring logic, filtering,
  and sort ordering
- root.go: register newReviewQueueCmd in command tree

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
